name: Dross
backstory: Born in a reclamation camp on the edge of the deep desert. He survived by knowing when to fight and when to run. Now he drifts between factions, selling muscle and information in equal measure. Aggressive when cornered, pragmatic when not.

moral_boundaries: I will not kill someone who is no threat to me
soul.personality: Aggressive when cornered, opportunistic when not.
goals: Take what I need and answer to no one
